scenarios.name: Breach of Contract — Damages (Business)

checks.detail: Total claim Rs.32L or breakdown stated

scenarios.draft_text:
IN THE COURT OF THE Commercial Court (COMMERCIAL DIVISION)
AT Bengaluru

C.S. No. __________ / 20____

TechSoft Solutions Pvt Ltd,
Aged about {{PLAINTIFF_AGE}} years,
Occupation: Company,
Residing at: MG Road, Bengaluru.

                                                        ... PLAINTIFF

                    VERSUS

CloudBridge Systems LLP,
Aged about {{DEFENDANT_AGE}} years,
Occupation: Limited Liability Partnership,
Residing at: Whitefield, Bengaluru.

                                                        ... DEFENDANT

SUIT FOR RECOVERY OF DAMAGES FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT UNDER SECTION 73 OF THE INDIAN CONTRACT ACT, 1872

MOST RESPECTFULLY SHOWETH:

COMMERCIAL COURT MAINTAINABILITY

1. The subject matter of the present suit arises out of a commercial dispute within the meaning of Section 2(1)(c) of the Commercial Courts Act, 2015. The suit is valued above the specified value of {{AMOUNT}} as prescribed under Section 12 of the Commercial Courts Act, 2015, and is therefore maintainable before this Hon'ble Commercial Court.

{{SECTION_NOT_GENERATED}}

LIMITATION

2. The suit is within limitation under Article 55 of the Schedule to the Limitation Act, 1963, the period prescribed being three years from the date on which the contract was broken. The suit is filed well within the prescribed period.

SECTION 12A COMPLIANCE

3. {{MEDIATION_STATUS -- CONFIRM: (a) Was pre-institution mediation conducted? If yes, provide mediation authority, date, and outcome certificate.
(b) If not, is urgent interim relief being sought? Section 12A compliance is mandatory for commercial suits unless urgent interim relief is sought.}}

FACTS OF THE CASE

4. On {{DATE_OF_CONTRACT}}, the Plaintiff and the Defendant entered into a written agreement regarding {{CONTRACT_DETAILS}}, copy whereof is filed as Annexure P-1.
5. The Plaintiff duly performed all obligations required on its part under the agreement, specifically {{PLAINTIFF_PERFORMANCE_DETAILS}}.
6. Under the terms of the agreement, the Defendant was required to {{DEFENDANT_OBLIGATION}}.

{{SECTION_NOT_GENERATED}}
7. The Defendant failed to perform the contractual obligations on {{DATE_OF_BREACH}}.
8. The Plaintiff issued legal notice dated {{NOTICE_DATE}} calling upon the Defendant to perform its obligations, but the Defendant did not comply. A copy of the notice is filed as Annexure P-2.

{{SECTION_NOT_GENERATED}}

LOSS AND DAMAGE

9. By reason of the Defendant's failure to perform, the Plaintiff has suffered actual and direct financial loss.
10. The Plaintiff quantifies the said loss at Rs. {{TOTAL_SUIT_VALUE}}/-, and the computation with supporting material is set out in Annexure P-3.

{{SECTION_NOT_GENERATED}}

{{SECTION_NOT_GENERATED}}

{{SECTION_NOT_GENERATED}}

{{SECTION_NOT_GENERATED}}

SCHEDULE OF DAMAGES / PARTICULARS OF DAMAGES

The Plaintiff claims the following heads of damages with computation methodology:

(i) Actual and direct financial loss
     Amount claimed: Rs. {{TOTAL_SUIT_VALUE}}/-
     Basis / methodology: {{ACTUAL_LOSS_BASIS}}
     Documentary proof: {{ACTUAL_LOSS_PROOF}}

TOTAL DAMAGES CLAIMED: Rs. {{TOTAL_SUIT_VALUE}}/-

LIST OF DOCUMENTS

Annexure A — Software Development Agreement dated 01.02.2024

Annexure B — NEFT receipt (UTR: ICIC20240201456789)

Annexure C — Email correspondence showing abandonment

Annexure D — Loss assessment report by auditor

Annexure E — Legal notice dated 01.07.2024

VERIFICATION

Verified at {{CITY}} on this the ____ day of __________ 20____.

I, {{PLAINTIFF_NAME}}, the Plaintiff above-named, do hereby verify that the contents of paragraphs 1 to 10 of this plaint are true and correct to my knowledge, and no material facts have been concealed therefrom, and that I have not filed any other suit, petition, or proceeding in any court or before any authority in respect of the same subject matter and cause of action.

DEPONENT

{{PLAINTIFF_NAME}}

PLAINTIFF

STATEMENT OF TRUTH

I, {{PLAINTIFF_NAME}}, the Plaintiff / authorised representative of the Plaintiff herein, do hereby state on solemn affirmation that the contents of the above plaint and the facts stated in paragraphs 1 to 10 are true to my knowledge and belief and nothing material has been concealed therefrom.

I understand that I shall be liable to proceedings under law for making a false statement.

Verified at {{CITY}} on this the ____ day of __________ 20____.

                                    {{PLAINTIFF_NAME}}

                                    PLAINTIFF

                                    THROUGH:
                                    {{ADVOCATE_NAME}}
                                    Advocate for the Plaintiff
                                    Enrollment No. {{ENROLLMENT_NO}}
                                    {{ADVOCATE_ADDRESS}}
                                    Mobile: {{ADVOCATE_PHONE}}
                                    Email: {{ADVOCATE_EMAIL}}
